plugins.name: poooof
plugins.description: Lightweight project framework: scaffold new projects, adopt or upgrade the framework in existing repos, run features in parallel with git-worktree streams, catch same-file merge overlap before it bites, and run a task autonomously overnight with a verified morning review. Commands are poooof:new-project / adopt / start-stream / finish-stream / check-streams / start-harness-run / harness-report / handoff / tidy / update / convert-to-bare.
